title: deschampsia media var. iberica
intro: Deschampsia media var. iberica, also known as Iberian hair grass, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the grass family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive problems, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, Iberian hair grass is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
